name: Igneous Kal-Zuk
hoverSummary: Tier 100 hybrid Zuk cape carrying the ranged Deadshot upgrade among its combined passives.
detailLines: Examine: A cape made of ancient, enchanted obsidian, infused with unmatched igneous energy.
Tier 100 hybrid cape created from the four igneous capes.
Includes the ranged Deadshot adrenaline reduction and damage upgrade.
